overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia traversing a scenic mountain meadow. The character walks along a dirt path toward a ruined stone tower, circles around it at a run, and continues through wildflower fields to a misty river. The environment features lush vegetation, distant snow-capped mountains, and dramatic natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain meadow path approaching ruined tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the ruined stone tower in the distance

entered.detail: tall stone ruin with broken walls and wooden supports standing on a grassy hill
winding dirt trail through the grass meadow
scattered evergreen trees dotting the hillside
distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks under cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through a grassy meadow dotted with wildflowers. The ruined stone tower looms ahead against a backdrop of snow-capped mountains and scattered pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: close approach to ruined stone tower with wooden scaffolding

events.description: character transitions from walking to running speed
tower structure temporarily blocks view of distant mountains while circling around it

agents.ego_description: running around the base of the ruined tower, navigating the grassy terrain at the structure's edge

entered.detail: weathered wooden beams and platforms attached to the stone tower walls

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run, approaching the massive ruined tower with its wooden scaffolding and defensive spikes. He circles around the right side of the structure, moving from the path into tall grass as the tower temporarily obscures the mountain view.

scene_state.functional_zone: wildflower meadow leading to misty river

events.description: terrain transitions from dry meadow to wetland area as river comes into view
character slows from running to walking upon reaching the riverbank

agents.ego_description: running through tall grass and wildflowers, then slowing to walk along the riverbank while observing the water and distant mountains

entered.detail: flowing waterway with visible current and reflective surface
dense patches of yellow flowers in the tall grass
low-lying fog hovering above the river surface in the distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the tower behind, Geralt runs through dense wildflower meadows toward a winding river. The landscape opens up to reveal mist rising from the water and panoramic mountain views. He slows to a walk as he reaches the riverbank, continuing alongside the flowing water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a lush mountain meadow that transitions from a guided path toward a wide, misty riverbank. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through wildflowers, with a ruined stone tower and snow-capped mountains looming in the distance. As the character breaks into a run, the camera follows him closely toward the massive tower, circling around its wooden scaffolding and defensive spikes while the structure temporarily obscures the horizon. The scene then opens up as he leaves the ruins behind, sprinting through dense wildflower fields until the landscape expands to reveal a winding river with rising mist. Finally, the pace slows to a walk as the camera tracks alongside the flowing water under a panoramic mountain view.
